info.description: Backend REST API for the Dermify application
info.title: Dermify API

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, returning JWT access and refresh tokens
Revokes the provided refresh token

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile

post.description: Validates an existing refresh token, revokes it, and issues a new access/refresh token pair
Creates a new user account with a hashed password

get.description: Returns the health status of the API
Returns paginated list of patients with optional search by name, phone, or email.

post.description: Creates a new patient record with demographics.

get.description: Returns a single patient record by ID.

put.description: Updates a patient record. Requires version field for optimistic locking.

get.description: Returns the session history for a patient (empty until Phase 2).
Returns all active clinical endpoints, optionally filtered by module type.

parameters.description: Module type filter (ipl, ndyag, co2, rf, filler, botulinum_toxin)
parameters.name: module_type

get.description: Returns all active devices in the registry, optionally filtered by device type.

parameters.description: Device type filter (ipl, ndyag, co2, rf)
parameters.name: type

get.description: Returns a single device with its associated handpieces.
Returns all active indication codes, optionally filtered by module type.

parameters.description: Module type filter (ipl, ndyag, co2, rf, filler, botulinum_toxin)
parameters.name: module_type

get.description: Returns all active products in the registry, optionally filtered by product type.
Returns a single product from the registry.

post.description: Assigns a role (admin or doctor) to a user. Admin-only endpoint.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of sessions with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new treatment session for a patient.

get.description: Returns a single session by ID.

put.description: Updates a session's header fields. Requires version for optimistic locking.

get.description: Returns all addendum notes for a session.

post.description: Creates a new addendum note on a locked session.

get.description: Returns a single addendum by ID.
Returns audit trail entries filtered by entity type and ID.
Returns the consent record for a session.

put.description: Updates the consent record for a session. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Records informed consent for a session (one per session).
Transitions a signed session to permanently locked state.

get.description: Returns all treatment modules for a session.

post.description: Adds a treatment module (ipl, ndyag, co2, rf, filler, botulinum_toxin) to a session.
Creates a botulinum toxin module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns a botulinum toxin module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates a botulinum toxin module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Creates a CO2 laser module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns a CO2 module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates a CO2 module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Creates a dermal filler module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns a filler module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates a filler module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Creates an IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns an IPL module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates an IPL module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Creates an Nd:YAG laser module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns an Nd:YAG module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates an Nd:YAG module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Creates a radiofrequency module detail for a session.

get.description: Returns an RF module detail by module ID.

put.description: Updates an RF module detail. Requires version for optimistic locking.

delete.description: Removes a treatment module from a session.

get.description: Returns the clinical outcome for a session.

put.description: Updates the clinical outcome for a session. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Records the clinical outcome for a session (one per session).

get.description: Returns all photos for a session.

post.description: Uploads a before-type photo to a session.
Uploads a label-type photo for a specific treatment module.

get.description: Returns metadata for a single photo.

delete.description: Removes a photo from a session. Not allowed on signed/locked sessions.

get.description: Serves the actual photo file binary from the filesystem.
Returns the contraindication screening for a session.

put.description: Updates the contraindication screening for a session. Requires version for optimistic locking.

post.description: Records a contraindication screening for a session (one per session).
Validates session completeness and transitions to signed status.

get.description: Checks whether a session has all required components for sign-off.

post.description: Transitions a session to a new state (draft → in_progress → awaiting_signoff).

get.description: Returns a list of all users (admin only)

post.description: Creates a new user (admin only)

get.description: Returns a specific user by ID (admin only)

put.description: Updates an existing user by ID (admin only)

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID (admin only)
